tribe_description: These shoppers approach every purchase like a quick cost-benefit equation: does it work, does it last, and is it worth the price? They apply the same no-nonsense lens to their reviews—often bullet-pointed, comparison-oriented, and focused on concrete takeaways—so fellow consumers can decide in seconds.
tribe_definition: A tribe of pragmatic value seekers who look for products that deliver on what they care about most. They generally prioritize practical results, value for money.
population_definition: Health-conscious consumers who evaluate supplements, personal care, and wellness products.

inherent_behavioral_traits.text: Willing to call out flaws candidly
Motivated to save others time and money
Prefer measurable, real-world evidence over marketing claims

main.text: Avoiding wasted time or money on sub-par items
Helping others make fast, informed decisions
Minimizing hidden costs or accessory add-ons
Finding reliable everyday solutions rather than premium brands

validation_triggers: Noticeably lower cost than name-brand alternatives
Good fit or easy compatibility with existing gear
Solid construction or materials for the price
friction_points: Need to buy extra accessories separately
Buttons, controls or UI that complicate use

implicit_goals.text: Streamline purchasing choices for themselves and peers
Avoid hidden costs or disappointments through firsthand vetting

member_user_characteristics.characteristic_summary: This user is a pragmatic, value-conscious consumer who evaluates products through hands-on trials, precise measurements, and cost-per-use calculations. They write detailed, experience-based reviews that highlight functionality, convenience, and real-world performance to help others avoid mess, save money, and choose practical, high-quality items. Their primary motivation is to provide genuinely helpful guidance, reflecting a blend of thrift, high standards, and a preference for products that streamline everyday tasks.

This user is a pragmatic, value-conscious shopper who prioritizes durability, proper fit, and real-world functionality when judging products. Their reviews are brief but comparative and tip-oriented, often noting why they chose one item over another and offering sizing or usage advice to prevent buyer mistakes. They write mainly to help others make practical, cost-effective purchases rather than to provide extensive technical detail.

category_characteristics.Video Games: This user is practical and comparison-oriented, writing reviews after directly testing alternatives and choosing the option that best meets functional needs like battery life and overall performance. Their motivation is to signal tangible improvements and reliability, so their feedback is brief, decisive, and aimed at guiding others toward a superior upgrade.
category_characteristics.Fashion: This reviewer is pragmatic and budget-conscious, focusing on reliable fit, durability, and whether the item performs as advertised relative to its price. Their brief, matter-of-fact comments aim to confirm value and practicality rather than style, seeking to guide like-minded, cost-aware shoppers toward dependable choices.
category_characteristics.null: This user is practical and comfort-oriented, focusing on functional qualities like durability, material properties, and fit. Their reviews are concise yet instructional, offering preventative tips to help others avoid common issues, indicating an altruistic motive to share firsthand insights for better purchasing decisions. They prioritize real-world usability over aesthetics or price considerations.

member_user_characteristics.characteristic_summary: This user is a pragmatic, results-oriented shopper who prioritizes immediate functional performance; once a product works without issues, they are quick to endorse and repurchase it. Their reviews are concise, focused on personal testing and clear future buying intent, suggesting a motivation to signal reliability and value rather than provide exhaustive detail.

This user is a practical, detail-oriented shopper who evaluates products and services through the lens of real-world functionality, value for money, and customer-service interactions. Their reviews aim to guide others by documenting specific use-cases, potential limitations, and the steps they took to resolve issues, reflecting a desire to provide clear, experience-based advice rather than mere opinions.

category_characteristics.Video Games: This user is detail-oriented and motivated by practical, value-for-money considerations, carefully dissecting how game add-ons affect real in-game advantages. They document customer-service interactions, potential complications, and optimization tips to help others avoid hassles, showing a desire to guide fellow players with precise, experience-based advice.
category_characteristics.Fashion: This user is pragmatic and value-conscious, evaluating fashion items primarily on functional performance, comfort, and cost for specific, everyday activities like mild-weather walks and jogging. They write balanced, experience-based reviews that note time-tested durability and clearly outline both strengths and limitations, aiming to set realistic expectations and guide others toward practical, cost-effective choices.

member_user_characteristics.characteristic_summary: This user is a pragmatic, everyday consumer who evaluates products on real-world performance, sensory qualities, and cost-effectiveness. Their concise yet descriptive reviews compare items to cheaper or leading alternatives, highlight practical use cases, and sometimes include a spouse’s input, all in service of helping other shoppers make confident, value-oriented decisions.

category_characteristics.Video Games: This user is primarily functionality-driven, focusing on whether a product works consistently across different use cases. Their concise, matter-of-fact reviews aim to alert fellow gamers to compatibility issues and reliability concerns, suggesting a pragmatic motivation to save others time and frustration.
category_characteristics.All Beauty: This reviewer is pragmatic and results-oriented, judging beauty items by concrete performance factors such as staying power, ease of removal, texture, scent, and overall durability versus price. They value everyday practicality and good value-for-money, offering concise but specific observations that help other shoppers quickly gauge real-world effectiveness. Their goal is to provide straightforward, trustworthy reassurance rather than in-depth technical critique.

member_user_characteristics.characteristic_summary: This user is a pragmatic, experience-oriented consumer who judges products primarily on ease of use, entertainment value, and price. Their reviews are short, direct endorsements or warnings meant to give clear, rapid guidance to other casual buyers seeking practical, good-value options.

category_characteristics.Software: This user writes terse, visceral reactions that focus on immediate usability and engagement. They are motivated by personal enjoyment and simplicity, praising software that is fun, easy, and stands out from alternatives while quickly dismissing options they find boring or overly complex. Their purpose is to give snap recommendations or warnings for fellow users who also prioritize straightforward, entertaining experiences.
category_characteristics.null: This user is driven by spontaneous enthusiasm and enjoyment, writing very brief but emphatic reviews that broadcast their positive emotions. Their primary motivation is to celebrate standout experiences and quickly endorse what they perceive as the best, rather than to provide detailed analysis or comparison.
category_characteristics.Video Games: This reviewer is primarily motivated by practical considerations—namely functionality, ease of installation, and good value for money. They write concise, affirmative reviews that quickly reassure others about a product’s basic performance and cost-effectiveness rather than providing extensive detail.

member_user_characteristics.characteristic_summary: This user is a pragmatic, value-conscious shopper who tests products for everyday functionality and longevity, frequently comparing cost-effective or legacy options to pricier name brands. Their reviews are motivated by a desire to inform others about real-world usability—highlighting clarity of instructions, durability, and whether the item delivers practical benefits—rather than brand prestige. They write balanced, experience-based notes that weigh pros and cons so budget-minded readers can make sensible purchasing decisions.

category_characteristics.Software: This user is motivated by practicality and cost-consciousness, weighing legacy reliability against modern, free, or subscription-based alternatives. Their reviews reflect a historically informed perspective and aim to guide like-minded readers toward solid, traditional software options that avoid ongoing fees. They write succinctly yet comparably, emphasizing value and continuity over trendiness.
category_characteristics.Video Games: This user is primarily utility-driven, focusing on whether a product reliably fulfills its basic function and lasts over time. Their reviews are concise and matter-of-fact, aimed at confirming practicality rather than exploring features or offering elaborate critique. They write chiefly to inform others about functional adequacy and durability, reflecting a no-nonsense, reliability-oriented perspective.
category_characteristics.Health & Personal Care: This user is pragmatic and detail-oriented, judging products by observable effectiveness, ease of use, and clarity of instructions rather than claims alone. They compare items to competing brands, weigh value-for-money, and describe sensory and functional details (size, texture, mixing, sensation) to give readers a realistic picture. Their reviews aim to help others avoid disappointments by highlighting both practical benefits and overlooked shortcomings.

member_user_characteristics.characteristic_summary: This user is a pragmatic, results-oriented shopper who evaluates products by directly comparing them to standard alternatives and judging whether they deliver a tangible improvement in convenience or security. Their reviews are concise and candid, aimed at saving other consumers time by quickly stating whether the item met real-world expectations. They write primarily to share practical experience and prevent others from investing in solutions that offer no added value.

category_characteristics.Video Games: This reviewer is concise and utility-focused, primarily motivated by verifying basic functionality and compatibility for their family’s use, particularly their child’s gaming devices. They value reliability over detailed technical analysis and write brief, affirmative notes to reassure other practical buyers that a product simply works as expected.
category_characteristics.Health & Personal Care: This user is practicality-driven and weighs the functional payoff of a product against the effort or time it demands. Their reviews are brief, comparative, and focused on real-world performance, aiming to let others know when an item does not offer a clear advantage over conventional options.

member_user_characteristics.characteristic_summary: This user is a pragmatic, value-conscious consumer who writes reviews to guide others on whether a product meets specific functional needs and represents the best available option. They compare alternatives, weigh feature sets, price, and availability, and present balanced buy-or-pass recommendations aimed at helping shoppers make informed purchasing decisions.

category_characteristics.Software: This user is pragmatic and comparison-oriented, often benchmarking software against past experiences to judge relative quality. Their primary motivation is to help fellow Kindle Fire users understand what options exist and whether an app is at least adequate for basic needs, emphasizing availability and compatibility over premium features. Consequently, their reviews are concise and conversational, focused on setting realistic expectations rather than exhaustive technical analysis.
category_characteristics.Video Games: This reviewer is a pragmatic, experience-driven gamer who focuses on core gameplay quality (story and online modes), technical presentation (graphics, HDTV), and purchase value (new vs. used copies). Their reviews aim to give straightforward buying guidance by highlighting what’s included, what’s missing, and whether the product justifies the cost, showing a desire to help others avoid disappointment and make informed choices.

AEK3IYABOEGTXOTX7P6SBQJUP57A.product_description: Cordless Electric Hair Straightener Curling Flat Iron with Floating Ceramic Plates & Adjustable Temp Portable for Travelling with USB Charging Cable
AEK3IYABOEGTXOTX7P6SBQJUP57A.review_text: im giving this TINY CORDLESS doll hair straightener 4 stars b/c it is going to reside in the center console of my car.  when I get stuck in the rain, this little baby is gonna hit up the front my my head.  my bangs are always the 1st to kink up.  so, this is the 1st straighter ive ever seen that has teeth on the sides of the plates.  they work as combs that catch and pull the hair.  its a little weird at 1st, but it helps to do the job.  this has 3 settings 320, 365, and 392 degrees.  it has a usb charger, but no wall plug provided.  this machine doesnt give u a super smooth look like my Dyson($400), but it does make ur hair straight, and in a pinch it will definitely help u out of a jam.  I hope this was helpful.

AEK3IYABOEGTXOTX7P6SBQJUP57A.product_description: Jinri Professional Tourmaline Hair Dryer, Negative Ionic Blow Dryer with Concentrator, Lightweight Low Noise 1875W DC Motor Fast Dry Hair Blow Dryer
AEK3IYABOEGTXOTX7P6SBQJUP57A.review_text: ughhhh!!!  hated this!!!!  if I could have given it a zero for "easy to hold" I would have.  I struggled to get thru half of my hair b4 I broke out my Dyson to finish my hair.  the 3 things it has going for it is that its lightweight,  its not that noisy, and that it has a GFI in the plug.  that being said its hard to hold when u r using a round brush in 1 hand and this in another.  the hot setting isn't that hot and the cold setting isn't that cold!  its like the opposite of what u would want in a blow dryer.  it doest have a 360 degree cord and the front where the air comes from is to small to dry ur hair fast.  and the attachment makes it even worse.  If I were u, id save my money.  I hope this was helpful.

AEK3IYABOEGTXOTX7P6SBQJUP57A.product_description: FG Clean Wipes Non-Woven Polyester/Cellulose Cleanroom Wipes for General Cleaning - 9" x 9" - 300 Per Bag - Saturix WD109
AEK3IYABOEGTXOTX7P6SBQJUP57A.review_text: at $21.95 they come out to about 7 cents a wipe.  it feels expensive in the beginning, but after Alexa does the math for u, u realize are they each worth 7 pennies a piece... yes they r.  they last... and last.  I used 1 with pledge to clean my glass dinning table (not cleaned in at least a month... dont judge... we dont use it), after I was done the wipe was still looking good so I moved on to my wet bar.  I folded it a bunch of times to keep the side I was using clean.  I then went into the kitchen with a new 1 and did all of my kitchen counter granite.  as kitchen size goes... its smaller, but not that small.  my granite is black and I didnt realize how much yucky stuff was lurking til I used a single wipe.  I then grabbed another and cleaned my entire toilet.  again great results.  ok lets recap... for 21 cents I cleaned my wet bar, dinning room table, kitchen counter, and my toilet... sign me up for another package of 300 please.  I did put the towel down for a few minutes after wiping the table and I will say that it dried rather fast, so if it isn't really dirty I think u could use 1 again... im not sure if u would want to keep a used 1 lying around, but I think u could.  the only thing I didnt love about the product was the packaging.  these 9" x 9" cloths are just lying on top of eachother in a super simple plastic wrapper that once it is open... its not cleanroom ready.  anything could get into the package.  I suppose if u were already inside a clean room when u opened them, it would remain clean, but it just feels like they should have added a ziplock edge to one side of the package.  just a side note... I tried to tear 1 with just water on it, and I wasnt able to... I wasnt using all of my strength, but by just pulling it only stretched the wipe out, it did not tear it.  they r pretty heavy duty and lint free when it comes to cleaning.  I hope this was helpful.

AEK3IYABOEGTXOTX7P6SBQJUP57A.product_description: Neck Stretcher, Yarkor Cervical Traction Device for Neck Pain Relief, Neck and Shoulder Relaxer, Chiropractic Pillow Neck Stretcher for TMJ Pain Relief and Cervical Spine Alignment（Gray）
AEK3IYABOEGTXOTX7P6SBQJUP57A.review_text: I was super excited to try this baby out!!  I love when u go for a massage and the masseuse lifts my neck up and out like a turtle.  I thought that this pillow would give me that feeling for less than $30 whenever I wanted it, but I was wrong.  this for me was very uncomfortable wherever I put it... the floor, the bed, the couch.  sometimes I felt like the blood was rushing to my head like I was hanging upside down.  its a no for me.  I had my boyfriend try it as well to see if it was me or how I was using it... he was underwhelmed as well.  I hope this was helpful.

AEK3IYABOEGTXOTX7P6SBQJUP57A.product_description: YBLNTEK Body Hair Trimmer for Men with Vacuum Hair Suction, Replaceable Ceramic Blade Heads Groin Hair Trimmer for Skin Safety, Pubic Hair Trimmer Waterproof Wet and Dry, Ultimate Male Hygiene Razor
AEK3IYABOEGTXOTX7P6SBQJUP57A.review_text:
I have to say I was super skeptical that this product was going to work UPSIDE DOWN, but my boyfriend said it work perfectly! he buzzes his head at least once a week with no guard on the clippers. he also does his chest and sometimes, when im forced to... I do his back for him. I asked him last night how he felt about the product and he said he LOVED IT. after he buzzes his hair he always has to take out the vacuum and do a whole big cleanup on the floor... not last week!!! he said the clipper caught almost all of the hair and there were so few that made it to the floor that he just left them b/c I wouldnt even notice them.... and I have to say... I didnt. less mess in my bathroom... ahhhh yes please!
u get 3 guards total. 2 of them flip over so thats really 4 settings and 1 fader. the fan has 2 speeds and the clippers plug in using a usb cable, which is provided, but no wall plug. in my opinion, the machine was pretty quite for both clipping and vacuuming at the same time. I have to say that I expected it to be much, much, much louder than it actually was. I hope this was helpful.

u get 10 bags for about $1.50 a piece.  they look fancy, but I wouldnt consider them Christmas bags, they look more like Hanukah gift bags.  I ordered white and blue bags.  the bags are mostly white, with shiny blue accents.  u get snowflakes on it with " 'tis the season" written at the bottom.  the handles do not come attached, so u have to thread them urself.  the ends of the blue ribbon handles are covered in plastic... kinda like a shoelace.  this helps it from pulling out of the hole.  the bottom of the bag includes a built in extra cardboard piece that makes it more sturdy for heavier gifts.  the bag measures 8" x 4.5" x 11".  so u can imagine how much stuff u could get in the bag, I was able to get 6 16.9 water bottles comfortably in the bag.  it was in 2 rows of 3.  the bag looks nicer than $1.50, so I would buy these again if I needed to give out a lot of Hanukah gifts in the future.  I hope this was helpful.

AEK3IYABOEGTXOTX7P6SBQJUP57A.product_description: GREEN BEAN Thank You Gift Bags, Gift Bags 10x4.5x11 Inches, Gift Bags with Handles, Black Gift Bags with Gold Foil (Pack of 6)
AEK3IYABOEGTXOTX7P6SBQJUP57A.review_text: these classy, shinny black bags are beautiful!  u only get 6 for $14, but u definitely get what u pay for.  the gold lettering is also nicely displayed.  I use 16.9 bottles of water in every bag I order, so u as a potential customer will know exactly how much space u will have.  I was able to put a total of 7 bottles standing up... 2 rows of 3 and 1 on the end.  the bag includes a cardboard bottom for support and handles that u have to add urself.  ive never had to put my own straps on a bag b/4... it was kinda fun to work for the end result.  I thought the handles would not be sturdy enough without tying a knot at the end, but I was wrong.  I was able to pick up all 7 bottles without supporting the bottom and the straps didnt pop out... would I suggest putting such a heavy item in the bag without holding the bottom... no, but it can be done.  the presentation this bag makes, is one of a Bloomindales' wrapper.  it has such an elegant design and the person receiving the gift will think u spent a lot more money than $2.33 on the wrapping.  I hope this was helpful.

AEK3IYABOEGTXOTX7P6SBQJUP57A.product_description: Daarcin 3 Sizes 60pcs Mixed Resealable Foil Pouch Smell Proof Bags,Mylar Ziplock Food Bags for Daily Life Storage
AEK3IYABOEGTXOTX7P6SBQJUP57A.review_text:
u get 3 different sized bags in this package of 60. I measured the bags at home, but they are a little smaller in capacity than the actual bag size.
12" x 8"
8" x 5.75"
6" x 4"
one side is see-through and the other side is a bright, shiny, silver color. they do a great job sealing in the freshness... and they r smell proof. I put some spices in the smallest sized bag. I also use this size for M&Ms on the go or if I haven't finished a slightly larger bag. u could also store AAA batteries nicely in the bag. the photo provided above is the medium sized bag... I figured everyone knows what a package of Ramen Noodles looks like so u could kinda measure the size of the amount of storage u r actually getting. the largest bag could hold a pound of pasta in it if u wanted to junk the cardboard box. I always keep my pasta in the fridge to prevent the bugs from coming alive inside the box... its always funny to me that my boyfriend didnt know what the plastic window of the front of the box was for... A. to see what shape it is and B. (the most important thing) to make sure its not full of BUGS when u purchase it!!! I really dont like taking up the space with the box, so I will be keeping a large bag in my fridge for pasta storage. I hope this was helpful.

AF3VPCFJ2IIPCSYO73JDEMXVFFFQ.product_description: Turtle Beach’s Stealth 520 brings 100% wireless gaming audio on PS4 Pro, PS4 and PS3 to spectacular new heights, with large 50mm speakers and DTS Headphone:X 7.1 Surround Sound to deliver amazing, 3D 360-degree soundscapes with unmatched spatial accuracy. The Stealth 520 also includes Turtle Beach’s exclusive Superhuman Hearing sound setting which gives gamers the competitive advantage by allowing them to hear soft sounds like enemy footsteps sneaking-up from behind and weapon reloads off in the distance. Additionally, the Stealth 520 offers DTS Surround Sound Modes and Turtle Beach EQ audio presets, Dynamic Chat Boost, Mic Monitoring and Adaptive Mic Performance, a 15-hour rechargeable battery and mobile/tablet compatibility. AF3VPCFJ2IIPCSYO73JDEMXVFFFQ.review_text: Tried the sony headphones first. Returned them and got these. Very happy with these. Battery also last longer than most headphones.
predicted_themes: Hardware Build Quality Comfort and Connectivity

AGMFKGT7LEZAIR3RUQJG4CHEPWTQ.product_description: The PS5 console unleashes new gaming possibilities that you never anticipated. Experience lightning fast loading with an ultra-high speed SSD, deeper immersion with support for haptic feedback, adaptive triggers, and 3D Audio, and an all-new generation of incredible PlayStation games.

AHBB2OLXVWCQGJNDQ22NQBKRKCOQ.review_text:
This Starter Pack still works (as of the start of April, 2022) on new/fresh free accounts. I understand that there would probably be some complications or redundancies if you try to apply it to an already Premium or VIP account. For example, if you already have a 4th storage bag, you wouldn't get a 5th bag. However you would absolutely get a 4th, if you only have the basic three storage bags.

There was a slight complication with my account when I redeemed the key code in the in-game store, as my account wasn't initially upgraded from Free status to Premium status. I had to contact customer service, and it took over a week for them to finally respond to my ticket. They fixed the issue with no additional questions asked, but it did take over a week for a response. Hence the -1 star.

Aside: In practice, the noteworthy difference really just seems to be whether you can only create two characters per server (Free) or three (or four?) characters per server (Premium). I'm apparently able to create five, but my understanding with Premium is that it would allow me to create three.

I do think that this may be just during your first month though. So -- you should create five characters during that first month and then make sure you log in to play on that character at least once.

Anyway! LOTRO ended up being a surprisingly good and enjoyable game, and so I am definitely happy with my purchase. The mount, riding skill, additional bag storage, and currency cap removal have all helped out so far in my leveling. (Level 32 as of today.) So, I'm happy with the purchase.

AG3HKK7MIKRQ7DOTNDOE63X2WJGQ.product_description: Choose your glow with the Afterglow Deluxe+ audio wired Controller for Nintendo Switch. Enjoy the light show your Pro Controller will be able to create with the dimmable Prismatic LED lighting with full color range Gamers can cycle through the Rainbow, set their favorite color, or turn off the lights completely. Peek into the controller's clear polycarbonate housing, to reveal its inner circuitry. Since it's the Afterglow Deluxe+ audio wired Controller, It also includes a 3.5mm jack with support for in-game chat and audio, as well as dual programmable back buttons. With a 10-foot attached cable, you'll have plenty of room to play, while onboard audio controls add a hassle-free way to access and adjust audio levels without interrupting game play.
AG3HKK7MIKRQ7DOTNDOE63X2WJGQ.review_text: Doesn't work in some games - Pokémon lets go as an example. otherwise, it has worked for other games fine.

AE6YLEEPJ47WLVVHEJ4CSBONBVBA.product_description: Teyomi Protective Case Compatible with Nintendo Switch Lite, Silicone Protective Cover for Nintendo Switch Lite with Tempered Glass Screen Protector, 4 Pcs Thumb Grips & 2 Game Cartridges(Pink)
AE6YLEEPJ47WLVVHEJ4CSBONBVBA.review_text: Works well and was easy to install. Good price, I'm glad I bought it.

AFEYHZ6ZZCDYHVCZKIEDM2HZTVSA.product_description: 32GB Micro SD Card, SIKROFEGEN Micro SD Memory Card, High Speed 4K TF Card for Nintendo Switch/GoPro/Speaker/Smartphone
AFEYHZ6ZZCDYHVCZKIEDM2HZTVSA.review_text: It works OK for my MP3 player.  This came along at a good time since the last one I got stopped working for some reason.  Hopefully this lasts longer.  Otherwise it's a basic micro-SD card or TF card as they also call them.
predicted_themes: Hardware Build Quality Comfort and Connectivity

AFEYHZ6ZZCDYHVCZKIEDM2HZTVSA.product_description: Focuswell Omega 3 Fish Oil 2000 mg, EPA & DHA, Omega 3 Supplement Supports Immune & Heart Health, Fish Oil Supplement for Joint, Eye and Brain Health - 100 Softgels
AFEYHZ6ZZCDYHVCZKIEDM2HZTVSA.review_text: They might have more Omega-3s but it's really hard to see any actual effect vs other pills.  These aren't quite as big as some but not as small as others.

AFEYHZ6ZZCDYHVCZKIEDM2HZTVSA.product_description: Base Labs Numbing Cream for Tattoos, Piercings, Waxing
AFEYHZ6ZZCDYHVCZKIEDM2HZTVSA.review_text: This is OK but not great.  It says not to use your finger but it doesn't have an applicator so I guess you're supposed to use a tissue?  It burned a little when I first put it on.  Later when I had to wipe it felt a bit numb, so I guess the numbing property does work.  I don't really like it as much as some of the name brand ones I have.

AFEYHZ6ZZCDYHVCZKIEDM2HZTVSA.product_description: That Good Sh*t Prebiotic Powder, Vegan Fiber Supplement with Organic Acacia, Restore Gut Health & Balance Digestion, by Tonic
AFEYHZ6ZZCDYHVCZKIEDM2HZTVSA.review_text: It says to put in your favorite drink.  I was drinking generic diet soda, so I put a packet in.  It really didn't mix well at all.  There was actually a lump of it in the bottom of the cup.  So maybe they should be more specific on which drinks it can go into.
It looks like chicken or turkey gravy but when you put it in it is cold for a while, which can be nice.

AFEYHZ6ZZCDYHVCZKIEDM2HZTVSA.product_description: Ever Ready First Aid Sterile Twist-Cap Lancets 30G Purple (300 Count) with Alcohol Prep Pads (200 Count) – Individually Wrapped
AFEYHZ6ZZCDYHVCZKIEDM2HZTVSA.review_text: They're pretty basic and work fine but there are a lot of them so it's a good deal.

AE2NUFEWGEU2RN7TC43DDAZTFPAA.product_description: The Tomee AC Adapter replaces any broken or lost AC Adapter for the New 2DS XL/ New 3DS/ New 3DS XL/ 2DS/ 3DS XL/ 3DS/ DSi XL/ DSi. The fold away plug allows easy transport, and its auto voltage input lets you use this AC adapter worldwide.
AE2NUFEWGEU2RN7TC43DDAZTFPAA.review_text: Works with our sons 3 ds xl. No complaints.

AE2NUFEWGEU2RN7TC43DDAZTFPAA.product_description: Performance laces never looked so great! these super-secure, ultra-grippy, elastic laces are the ideal no-tie shoelace solution for athletes.
AE2NUFEWGEU2RN7TC43DDAZTFPAA.review_text: I bought these to try, and left the in for about a week before taking them back out. Didnt feel any more secure than regular laces, but took more time to get just right. So just didn't work for me.

AFXLIQZ2JTZLSTS3PD2OZTGWHHOQ.product_description: One of the most critically-acclaimed games in history, Call of Duty: Modern Warfare is back, remastered in true high-definition. Call of Duty 4: Modern Warfare set a new standard upon its original release for intense, cinematic action, while receiving universal praise as one of the most influential video games of all-time. Relive one of the most iconic campaigns in history, as you are transported around the globe. You’ll suit up as unforgettable characters Sgt. John "Soap" MacTavish, Capt. John Price and more, as you battle a rogue enemy group across global hotspots from Eastern Europe and rural Russia, all the way to the Middle East. Additionally, team up with your friends in the online mode that redefined Call of Duty by introducing killstreaks, XP, Prestige and more in customizable, classic multiplayer modes.
AFXLIQZ2JTZLSTS3PD2OZTGWHHOQ.review_text: Arguably the best game of the COD series. Now only better, if you fancy online play and story mode. Otherwise take a pass. I hadn't gamed in several years but when I heard about this I was drawn back in like a month to the flame. Graphics, holy smokes, seriously, it looks amazing and if you don't have a sweet quality HDTV or better then you're missing out. However if your interested in alternate game modes and all the various other features, take a pass. They aren't here on the side version. Maybe the dl version has them, I can't say but the disc version has 3 modes, story mode, online multiplayer and offline multiplayer which is straight up you and a friend going haed to head shooting beside 1 another on the same console via split screen. But otherwise, but this game, best price there is for a new copy, used copies are sketchy and get your game on.
